title: Better MC
description: Custom Modpack for Better MC Server.
body:
This is a private modpack created specifically for a small SMP server shared between friends. The goal of the pack is to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience without turning it into something overly complex or grind heavy. It focuses on quality of life improvements, light progression changes, exploration enhancements, and server friendly performance mods to keep gameplay smooth and enjoyable for long term worlds.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
